x-enumeration-literals.name: Real-Time Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Incentives calculated and credited instantly after the qualifying event.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Incentives calculated and credited at scheduled intervals (e.g., end-of-day, monthly).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Manual Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Incentives applied manually by an operator.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Provisional Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Temporary earning pending validation (e.g., pending transaction settlement).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Incentives credited only after meeting a condition (e.g., minimum spend threshold).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Aggregated Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Earning calculated based on total activity over a period rather than per transaction.
